creator: archie@whistle.com
text:
If you press control-z immediately after getting a vi error
	message (displayed inverted on the bottom line), you get
	a shell prompt, and all from there on all text is displayed
	inverted.

Fix: 

Don't do that.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Start up an xterm
	Type "vi" <return>
	Type "/nonexistant-string" <return>
	You get an error message
	Type CTRL-Z
	Type anything -- notice it's inverted now
